steps.t: Eliaril has asked you to bring a crate of tonics to the Calembel barracks. The crate is in a small hamlet, outside of the city.
Eliaril has asked you to bring a crate of tonics to Maeron. Maeron is in the Calembel barracks.
Maeron has asked you to distribute tonics to wounded soldiers in the Calembel barracks.
You should let Maeron know that have brought healing potions to many of the wounded soldiers in the barracks. Maeron is in the Calembel barracks.
